Registry / Terms / fault

fault

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00661 · 56 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 46 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

46 distinct definitions across 56 publications. 7 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

defect that has an impact on the properties or functions of the measuring instrument or that causes an error of indication greater than the MPE

202X2004OIML R 136-1:2004T.4.501908
difference between the error of indication and the intrinsic error of a measuring instrument Principally, a fault is the result of an undesired change of data contained in or flowing through an electronic instrument. In this Recommendation a “fault” is a numerical value.
pending
